description: Very large blockage polygon that covers all realistic exit/rejoin windows. All Valhalla candidates should be rejected or Valhalla should return nothing. Expected: no_safe_detour or emergency_fallback (but NOT a confident route through the polygon).
_note: Polygon covers the entire route. Valhalla returns no legs (no_legs_in_response) so the engine falls back to emergency_fallback — distinguished from no_safe_detour (where Valhalla found paths but feasibility rejected them all). In a real E2E run, very large polygons may also trigger no_safe_detour if Valhalla finds paths through back-streets that get rejected.
